import React ,{UseState} from 'react' import { useState } from 'react'; import {Card,Button,Row,Col,Modal} from 'react-bootstrap'; const Pizza = ({pizza}) => { const[variant,setVarient]=useState('small'); const[quantity,setQuantity]=useState(1); const [show, setShow] = useState(false); const handleClose = () => setShow(false); const handleShow = () => setShow(true); return ( <> {pizza.name}
Varient
Quantity
 Price : {pizza.prices[0][variant]*quantity}/- Rs Modal heading Woohoo, you're reading this text in a modal! ) } export default Pizza
